mapper.select:
SELECT A.INTNET_SVC_ID , A.INTNET_SVC_NM , A.INTNET_SVC_DC , A.REFLCT_AT , A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM TB_INTNET_SVC A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_INTNET_SVC A WHERE 1=1

SELECT A.INTNET_SVC_ID , A.INTNET_SVC_NM , A.INTNET_SVC_DC , A.REFLCT_AT , A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM TB_INTNET_SVC A WHERE A.INTNET_SVC_ID = #{intnetSvcId}

SELECT A.INTNET_SVC_ID , A.INTNET_SVC_NM , A.INTNET_SVC_DC , A.REFLCT_AT , A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM TB_INTNET_SVC A WHERE A.REFLCT_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC
